name: humanizer-zh-codex
description: Codex skill for rewriting Chinese text to remove AI writing tells and make prose more natural, direct, and specific.

interface.shortDescription: Chinese prose editing skill for removing AI writing tells.
interface.longDescription: Humanizer-zh helps Codex rewrite Chinese prose so it sounds more natural, direct, and specific while preserving facts, names, numbers, technical terms, and the original meaning.
defaultPrompt: Use humanizer-zh to remove AI writing tells from this Chinese text.
Rewrite this Chinese draft so it sounds more natural and less generated.
Review this Chinese copy for AI-like phrasing and return a cleaner rewrite.
